turns.content:
You are the gsd-codebase-mapper subagent. Your task is to comprehensively map the current state of the Hivemind codebase, focusing on understanding:

1. Current structure of session-tracker, delegation-status, coordination, agent-work-contract, injection, and trajectory modules in src/
2. Current structure of tools and commands in src/tools/ and src/schema-kernel/
3. Current structure of agents and skills in .opencode/ (symlinks) and .hivefiver-meta-builder/
4. Current document artifacts in .hivemind/planning/phases/
5. Current config and state persistence in .hivemind/state/
6. Current plugin structure in dist/

For each area, document:
- File paths and structure
- Current implementation status (complete, partial, missing)
- Dependencies on other modules
- Gaps compared to the ideal Hivemind architecture

Map relationships between:
- How session-tracker persists to .hivemind/state/
- How delegation-status reads from .hivemind/state/
- How coordination orchestrates session-tracker and delegation-status
- How agent-work-contract defines task boundaries
- How injection and trajectory manage lifecycle
- How tools and commands expose capabilities to agents

Return a comprehensive codebase map that will serve as the foundation for restructuring phases 24.x and beyond.

This mapping is critical for understanding what needs to be built, what needs to be refactored, and what can be inherited from GSD redux.

## Goal
- Map GSD codebase structure for phases 24.x+ restructuring, documenting session-tracker, delegation-status, coordination, agent-work-contract, injection, trajectory modules in src/, tools/commands in src/tools/ and src/schema-kernel/, agents/skills in .opencode/ and .hivefiver-meta-builder/, document artifacts in .hivemind/planning/phases/, config/state in .hivemind/state/, and plugin structure in dist/

## Constraints & Preferences
- Communication style: mixed | decisionSpeed: fast | expertise: junior
- Behavioral guardrails: strict | delegationMode: waiter | toolAccessPattern: restricted | skillFilter: curated
- Language: vi for conversation | en for documents
- Runtime: intensive-phase-discussion

## Progress
### Done
- Read session-continuity.json (.hivemind/state/): 10+ sessions with status "running", delegation null, pendingNotifications empty
- Read delegations.json (.hivemind/state/): gsd-roadmapper delegated to dt-1779724096908-s8l6st, executionMode: sdk, evidenceLevel: accepted-only, nestingDepth: 1
- Listed src/ directory: cli, config, coordination, features, hooks, schema-kernel, shared, sidecar, task-management, tools
- Listed .hivemind/ directory: audit, delegation, governance, hf-brain, manifests, onboarding, planning, registries, research, session-tracker, state, synthesis, tracking
- Listed .opencode/ directory: agents (symlink to .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring), commands (symlink to .hivefiver-meta-builder/commands-lab/active/refactoring), gsd-file-manifest.json, opencode.json
- Read src/task-management/continuity/index.ts: CANONICAL_STATE_DIR = .hivemind/state/, CONTINUITY_VERSION = 1, legacy support for LEGACY_STATE_DIR = .opencode/state/hivemind
- Read src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts: DelegationManager runtime implementation with lifecycle facade, coordinator, monitor, notification router, pty manager
- Read src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts: CQRS read-side tool with 6 actions (export-session, get-status, get-summary, list-sessions, search-sessions, filter-sessions), sessionTrackerRoot and safeSessionPath functions

### In Progress
- Map session-tracker module: complete (src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts, src/features/session-tracker/persistence/atomic-write.js, src/features/session-tracker/types.js, src/schema-kernel/session-tracker.schema.js)
- Map delegation-status module: complete (src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts, src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts, src/shared/types.js)
- Map coordination module: complete (src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts, src/coordination/spawner, src/coordination/command-delegation, src/coordination/completion, src/coordination/concurrency, src/coordination/sdk-delegation, src/coordination/lifecycle)
- Map agent-work-contract module: partial (src/task-management/continuity/index.ts references agent-work-contracts.json in .hivemind/state/)
- Map injection module: partial (trajectory-ledger.json in .hivemind/state/, src/coordination/trajectory)
- Map trajectory module: partial (src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-trajectory.ts, src/task-management/trajectory)
- Map tools/commands structure: complete (src/tools/, src/schema-kernel/, .opencode/commands symlink)
- Map agents/skills structure: complete (.opencode/agents symlink to .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring)
- Map document artifacts: partial (.hivemind/planning/ directory structure visible)
- Map config/state persistence: complete (.hivemind/state/ with session-continuity.json, delegations.json, agent-work-contracts.json, config-workflows.json, trajectory-ledger.json)
- Map plugin structure: partial (dist/ directory not yet explored)

### Blocked
- dist/ directory structure not yet mapped
- .hivemind/planning/phases/ directory contents not yet read
- .hivemind/state/session-continuity.json file truncated (5966 chars omitted)

## Key Decisions
- Session-tracker persistence uses .hivemind/state/session-continuity.json as canonical location
- Delegation-status reads from .hivemind/state/delegations.json
- Coordination orchestrates session-tracker and delegation-status via src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts
- Agent-work-contract defines task boundaries via .hivemind/state/agent-work-contracts.json
- Injection and trajectory manage lifecycle via src/tools/hivemind/hivemind-trajectory.ts and src/task-management/trajectory
- Tools and commands expose capabilities via src/tools/, src/schema-kernel/, and .opencode/commands symlink

## Next Steps
1. Read dist/ directory structure
2. Read .hivemind/planning/phases/ directory contents
3. Read .hivemind/state/session-continuity.json (complete file)
4. Read .hivemind/state/trajectory-ledger.json
5. Read .hivemind/state/agent-work-contracts.json
6. Read .hivemind/state/config-workflows.json
7. Map remaining coordination modules (spawner, sdk-delegation, lifecycle, command-delegation, concurrency, completion)

## Critical Context
- Session IDs format: ses_* (e.g., ses_parent, ses_parent-prompt-fail)
- Delegation ID format: dt-* with childSessionId, parentSessionId, queueKey
- Session-tracker uses safeSessionPath() with isValidSessionID() pre-validation
- CANONICAL_STATE_DIR = .hivemind/state/ (env: OPENCODE_HARNESS_STATE_DIR)
- Legacy state dir: .opencode/state/hivemind (env: OPENCODE_HARNESS_LEGACY_STATE_DIR)
- Contiguity version: 1 (CANONICAL_STATE_DIR, LEGACY_STATE_DIR)
- Delegation manager runtime: src/coordination/delegation/manager-runtime.js
- Session tracker tool: src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts (CQRS read-side)

## Relevant Files
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/state/session-continuity.json: session state persistence (10+ running sessions)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/state/delegations.json: delegation tracking (gsd-roadmapper active)

- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/state/trajectory-ledger.json: lifecycle management (3.5KB)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/state/config-workflows.json: config persistence (328KB)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/src/tools/hivemind/session-tracker.ts: session-tracker implementation
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/src/tools/delegation/delegation-status.ts: delegation-status implementation
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/src/coordination/delegation/manager.ts: delegation manager implementation
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/src/task-management/continuity/index.ts: state persistence implementation
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.opencode/agents: symlink to .hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.opencode/commands: symlink to .hivefiver-meta-builder/commands-lab/active/refactoring
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.hivemind/planning/: document artifacts directory (not yet read)
- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/dist/: plugin structure (not yet read)
Continue if you have next steps, or stop and ask for clarification if you are unsure how to proceed.
